title: Craftables
description: This mod adds/changes recipes in the game to not only make more sense but to feel more vanilla. It also changes textures to make it match the recipes more!
body:
### Have you ever wanted things to be crafted different or to be easier to obtain?
Like seriously, it makes no sense that saddles and name tags aren't **craftable**. (see what I did there?) Well this mod aims to change that by adding not only vanilla styled recipes but doesn't make the game overpowered and adds use to items that don't have full uses!

My favorite example of this is using copper instead of gold for powered rails! It doesn't only make it easier to get but gives an even bigger use to copper!

**Everything that got a recipe is listed here:**
- Bell
- Chainmail Helmet
- Chainmail Chestplate
- Chainmail Leggings
- Chainmail Boots
- Iron Horse Armor
- Golden Horse Armor
- Diamond Horse Armor
- Name Tag
- Saddle
- Leather

**Everything that got a changed recipe is listed here:**
- Powered Rail

For more questions, feedback, issues, or any suggestions for the mod itself, either DM @smartercob on Discord or join my Discord server!
- My Discord: [https://discord.gg/JMAy4g3pJF](https://discord.gg/JMAy4g3pJF)
- My Content Teams Discord: [https://discord.gg/bpcxbQxU2K](https://discord.gg/bpcxbQxU2K)
